payload.text:
Send me text to summarize, like:

📋 Summarize this: [paste your text here]

Or just describe what you'd like summarized!

send.text: /summary The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a second sentence. And a third one here. The fourth sentence continues.

payload.text: Summary: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a second sentence.

name: the Summary menu button shows the help text
